title: Koori no Hime wa Chiisana Hidamari de Tokasaretai
titleRomaji: Koori no Hime wa Chiisana Hidamari de Tokasaretai
titleNative: 氷の姫は小さな陽だまりでとかされたい
synonyms: The Ice Princess Wants to Be Melted by a Small Patch of Sunlight
synopsis: The first-year high school boy Aoba diligently helps to take care of his younger siblings while their parents are busy at work. One day, they are invited over to play at the home of Mizutori, the beautiful girl in his class known as the "Ice Princess"…!? (Source: Comic Trail, translated)

title: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleNative: 辺境ぐらしの魔王、転生して最強の魔術師になる
synonyms: The Demon King of the Frontier Life, Reincarnated To Become the Strongest Mage ~The Former Demon King Who Grows up While Being Loved, Wants To Know Humans~
synopsis: There was a mage called "The Lone Demon King" at the frontier. He was just a creature that never grew old, but he was loved by the villagers as something of a guardian deity. However, he was destroyed by a magic organization that sees his existence as dangerous. 200 years later, he is reincarnated as the second son of an aristocrat and obtains the strongest magic power. "Let's pretend to be a human this time..." However, being a human lover, he didn't particularly think of revenge and has decided to pretend to be human in this life. In his past life, he was the guardian deity of a region, and in this life, he's a local aristocrat, but he does not know common sense. He doesn't know how to take it easy. As the second son of an aristocrat, he is loved by his family and friends, and while he is regarded as a master of magic in the magic guild, he becomes an "Immortal Mage" behind the scenes. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

searchTerms: High Elf with a Long Life

title: Garbage Brave: Isekai ni Shoukan Sare Suterareta Yuusha no Fukushuu Monogatari
titleRomaji: Garbage Brave: Isekai ni Shoukan Sare Suterareta Yuusha no Fukushuu Monogatari
titleNative: ガベージブレイブ 異世界に召喚され捨てられた勇者の復讐物語
synonyms: Garbage Hero: A Revenge Story of a Hero Who Got Summoned to Another World
Garbage Brave Revenge story of a hero summoned and discarded in another world
synopsis: While on a regular school day, Tsukuru along with his classmates got transported to another world. However, at the other side of the summoning there was a hero's auction, where each nation would bid for the heroes to defeat the demon kings of each territories. While his classmates received cheat jobs and got auctioned quickly Tsukuru got the useless job "Chef." As no nation bid for him, he got thrown out through a transfer gate. At the other side of the gate was a territory dominated by strong monsters... (Source: Hifumi Shobo, translated)

Who will emerge as the ultimate victor?

title: Tou Xiang
titleRomaji: Tou Xiang
titleNative: 偷香
synonyms: Clandestine Affair
synopsis: Two women hidden away deep in a mansion, who save each other through their roller coaster of a relationship! Bai Yuetao, the wife of a rich businessman, blames herself for her husband's skirt-chasing. After getting all dressed up, only to spend another night alone in their lavish residence, she sees a graceful woman appear in her new mirror. This woman calls herself "Mengdie" and says that she can teach Bai Yuetao how to "hook" her husband's heart, but the price will be— Bai Yuetao's body. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Smile!
titleRomaji: Smiley
titleNative: スマイリー
synonyms: Усміхнені
synopsis: A journalist risks everything to uncover the truth behind a sinister cult... Yuushi Kamome is a freelance journalist who lost his beloved daughter in an unforeseen accident. His descent into despair following her death drove his wife to leave him, and he lives each day a shell of the man he once was. But his fate changes one day when members from a religious organization he had never heard of, the Smiling Hearts Society, knock on his door and hand him a flyer. He’s ready to dismiss them until he notices the face of his estranged wife on the flyer, smiling ever so softly. And so begins a tale of religion and insanity. What kind of sinister darkness lurks behind this religion and its strange smiles? (Source: Kodama)

title: No Matter How I Look at It, It's You Guys' Fault I'm Not Popular!
titleEnglish: No Matter How I Look at It, It's You Guys' Fault I'm Not Popular!
titleRomaji: Watashi ga Motenai no wa Dou Kangaete mo Omaera ga Warui!
titleNative: 私がモテないのはどう考えてもお前らが悪い!
synopsis: Kuroki Tomoko is a super popular, high school girl, who has had 50 years of dating experience, and 100 boys... in the Otome game world. In the real world, she is a 15 year old shut in, who has all of the qualities of a "mojo" (喪女, a gloomy or unpopular woman). However, when school isn't going as she expected, and she isn't as popular as she had thought she was, she takes a look at herself in the mirror for the first time in a few years, and has some shocking revelations...

titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Inexpressive Kashiwada and Expressive Oota
titleRomaji: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun
titleNative: 顔に出ない柏田さんと顔に出る太田君
synonyms: Expressionless Face Girl and Emotional Face Boy
Expressionless Kashiwada-san and Emotional Oota-kun
synopsis: Meet Kashiwada-san, a female middle-school student, who remains emotionless regardless of how she is meddled with. And Oota-kun, unable to control his facial expressions, is the complete opposite of Kashiwada-san--but he keeps messing with her, against his better judgment?! Though both of them are the exact opposite, will a mutual love eventually develop between them...? Note: Total chapter count includes 10 extra chapters.

I Want a Divorce, Please Stop Obsessing Over Me!
Don’t Be Obsessed, Let’s Get a Divorce!
synopsis: Edelis Brill, the beloved only daughter of a countess, sees herself stabbed to death by the emperor's sword in a book she discovers in her study. Seeking to change her fate, Edelis rescues the book's sole main character, the slave gladiator Lehan, and pours her endless affection into him. But! Lehan, whom she believed would protect her from the emperor's blade, has returned as the emperor, intent on her heart?! Edelis tries to escape, but Lehan's obsession grows ever stronger... Stop obsessing, divorce me! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: ROLL OVER AND DIE: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
titleRomaji: "Omae Gotoki ga Maou ni Kateru to Omou na" to Yuusha Party wo Tsuihou Sareta node, Outo de Kimama ni Kurashitai
titleEnglish: ROLL OVER AND DIE: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
titleNative: 「お前ごときが魔王に勝てると思うな」と勇者パーティを追放されたので、王都で気ままに暮らしたい
synonyms: omaegotoki
Omae Gotoki
Do You Think Someone like You Could Defeat the Demon Lord?
「就凭你也想打败魔王吗」被勇者一行所驱逐的少女要如何才能在王都过上自由的生活
Bị đuổi khỏi nhóm Anh hùng, tôi muốn sống tự do tự tại ở Vương đô
synopsis: Flum Apricot was never meant to be a hero. Despite zero stats across the board and a power she can’t even use, she somehow finds herself included in a party of heroes. But Flum’s life hits rock bottom when the party’s renowned sage, Jean Inteige, decides that the useless girl is dead weight, and arranges to have her sold into slavery. Tossed to monsters to be feasted upon for her master’s entertainment, Flum makes the desperate choice to reach for a cursed weapon…and something new awakens within her. A grimdark tale about one woman’s blood-soaked quest to reclaim her life! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleRomaji: Lodoss Tousenki: Eiyuu Kishiden
titleNative: ロードス島戦記-英雄騎士伝-
synonyms: Record of Lodoss War: Chronicles of the Heroic Knight
synopsis: Five years ago, a band of six adventurers defeated the conquering armies of Marmo, the dark island, and saved the accursed island, Lodoss. Since that day, the survivors have been honored as heroes, and their deeds have become legends. But the evil never perished...it retreated, waited and schemed. Now, the Black Knight of Marmo has returned to threaten the accursed island once more. Old heroes must heed the call to defend their homeland and new heroes are forged as the battle for Lodoss begins anew... (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

title: Ame to Umi
titleRomaji: Ame to Umi
titleNative: あめとうみ
synonyms: Ame And Umi
synopsis: It’s been a week since Ame Otosaka started high school. While glancing down the hallway, he catches sight of a familiar face: Umi Karasaki, a classmate from his middle school who had been absent without notice since the very first day of term. Even when she finally makes it to school, Umi remains a mystery: always looking down, hiding behind a mask of polite, empty smiles. Concerned, Ame decides to reach out and speak to her... (Source: Shueisha, translated)

title: Dame Inu Kanojo
titleRomaji: Dame Inu Kanojo
titleNative: ダメ犬彼女
synopsis: Sakurako Kuramochi has totally remade herself into a more popular girl since her debut in high school. However, deep down inside, she still bears the scars of being dumped by a girl she used to like. One day after school, while walking downtown, Sakurako bumps into another girl, who turns out to be that girl who rejected her in the past! For some reason, she proclaims that she's fallen in love with Sakurako at first sight, and asks if they can meet again. Sakurako gets angry at the girl for not recognizing her, and comes up with a plan to get revenge...? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)
